name: Kertos
description: German compliance automation platform for GDPR, EU AI Act, ISO 27001 with integrations for SaaS stacks.

seo.title: Kertos — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Kertos: German compliance automation platform for GDPR, EU AI Act, ISO 27001 with integrations for SaaS stacks.

when_to_use: GDPR data processing activity record (ROPA) automation
EU AI Act compliance documentation for ML product teams
SaaS stack integration for automated data mapping
DPO reporting dashboard for German regulatory requirements

pros: EU-native platform with German data residency
Coverage includes GDPR, EU AI Act, ISO 27001
Integration-based evidence collection for SaaS stacks
Strong fit for European regulatory expectations
cons: Smaller integration marketplace than US-based peers
Less brand traction outside DACH region
EU AI Act tooling still early as rules finalize
review.verdict: A thoughtful choice for EU companies that want a European compliance vendor — US teams get more value elsewhere.
review.best_for: DACH and EU companies wanting local vendor and AI Act readiness
review.not_for: US-centric teams with mostly American SaaS integrations
